---
name: New Tool Submission
about: Submit a new developer tool for the list
title: "[TOOL] Tool Name"
labels: new-tool
assignees: ""
---

**Tool Details**

- **Name:** Tool Name
- **URL:** https://example.com
- **Category:** (e.g., json-tools, regex, etc.)
- **License:** MIT / Apache-2.0 / Proprietary
- **Open Source:** Yes / No
- **Pricing:** Free / Freemium / Paid

**Description**

A clear description of what this tool does and why it's useful.

**Why this tool belongs here**

Explain how this tool helps developers and why it should be included.

**Checklist**

- [ ] I have tested the tool and it works
- [ ] The URL uses HTTPS
- [ ] The tool is free or has a meaningful free tier
- [ ] No duplicate exists in the list
- [ ] Description is unique and not copy-pasted
